patches.title: CrowdSec AppSec silently drops request body for chunked / HTTP-2 requests
patches.description:
## Summary

The CrowdSec AppSec component fails to read the HTTP request body for any request whose `Content-Length` is not positive — most notably HTTP/1.1 requests using `Transfer-Encoding: chunked`
